---
title: "LRPAL01d: Aligned-40-week dose sensitivity variant for word reading (W)"

date: last-modified
date-format: "YYYY-MM-DD HH:mm:ss Z"

format:
  html:
    code-fold: true
    theme: cosmo
    number-sections: true
    toc: true
    toc-depth: 3
    code-links:
      - repo
---

{{< include _partials/_header.qmd >}}

{{< include _partials/_setup.qmd >}}

{{< include _partials/_convergence.qmd >}}

## Overview

LRPAL01d is the **dose sensitivity variant** of [LRPAL01](../lrp-rli-al-001/) for word
reading (`ewrswr`): the same onset-aligned per-protocol ANCOVA, with the
cumulative sessions delivered over the aligned window added as a covariate
(`gamma_dose`).

::: {.callout-important title="Dose is a collider — sensitivity only"}

Cumulative sessions are a **collider** on the DAG (a descendant of both group —
the immediate arm accrues sessions earlier — and ability — more able / available
children attend more), so conditioning on dose can open a back-door. This model
is therefore a **sensitivity** read, **not** a primary adjustment set: interpret
`gamma_dose` as a within-arm dose-response *association*, expected to be weak or
inconclusive once onset baseline, age-at-onset and ability are in the model, and
never as a causal dose effect. As in LRPAL01 the cohort term is non-randomised, so
**every** coefficient here is an association.

:::

## Model

$$
W_{\text{post(aligned)}} \sim \operatorname{BetaBinomial}(n, \operatorname{expit}(\eta), \kappa),\quad
\eta = \alpha + \beta_{\text{cohort}}\,\text{immediate}
  + \gamma_{\text{own}}\operatorname{logit}_*(W_{\text{onset}})
  + \gamma_A A_{\text{onset,std}} + \gamma_{\text{ability}}z(\text{blocks})
  + \gamma_{\text{dose}}z(\text{sessions}).
$$

One row per child (no random intercept). Priors follow the shared template in `priors.py`.

![Model diagram](model_graph.png){#fig-model .lightbox fig-align="left"}

{{< include _partials/_priors.qmd >}}

{{< include _partials/_prior_predictive.qmd >}}

{{< include _partials/_diagnostics.qmd >}}

{{< include _partials/_results_aligned.qmd >}}

{{< include _partials/_footer.qmd >}}
